# gss_inquire_mech_for_saslname(_:_:_:)

**Function**

Returns the GSS-API mechanism identifier for a given Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name.

## Declaration

```swift
func gss_inquire_mech_for_saslname(_ minor_status: UnsafeMutablePointer<OM_uint32>, _ sasl_mech_name: gss_buffer_t?, _ mech_type: UnsafeMutablePointer<gss_OID?>) -> OM_uint32
```

## Parameters

- **minor_status**: A pointer to the secondary status result that provides additional information in case of failure.
- **sasl_mech_name**: The SASL G2 protocol name.
- **mech_type**: A pointer the function uses to output the GSS-API mechanism identifier.

## Return Value

A status code set to [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_COMPLETE] on success or [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/GSS_S_BAD_MECH] if the SASL name is unrecognized. See [doc://com.apple.gss/documentation/GSS/function-status] for a complete enumeration of status outputs.

## Queries

- **gss_indicate_mechs(_:_:)**: Returns the list of supported underlying security mechanisms.
- **gss_indicate_mechs_by_attrs(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the set of mechanisms that fulfill the given criteria.
- **gss_display_mech_attr(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns a human-readable name and description of a mechanism attribute.
- **gss_inquire_attrs_for_mech(_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the supported attributes for one or all mechanisms.
- **gss_inquire_saslname_for_mech(_:_:_:_:_:)**: Returns the Simple Authentication and Security Layer (SASL) protocol name for a given GSS-API mechanism.
